EmailTemplate.description: Email to be used when a customer's first DD payment has failed at the second attempt or no REP date is provided.
EmailTemplate.name: NTU 1 Email
EmailTemplate.subject: Your insurance policy is at risk of cancellation
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Do you require financial assistance?
There are a number of ways that Kingsbridge are able to support you to help ensure your insurance cover is not affected.
Please call us on 01242 808740 and our team will run through your options with you.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
You previously agreed to pay for your Kingsbridge business insurance policy [policy number] through direct debit payments.
Unfortunately, our credit providers Close Brothers Premium Finance have informed us that the most recent attempt to take payment has been unsuccessful.
Because of this, it has not been possible to collect any of the instalments due for your insurance policy.
Your policy is now at risk of cancellation. If your insurance policy is cancelled, your business may not be covered against claims if you don't have another insurance policy in place.
If a payment has not been made before [proposed cancellation date], your policy will be cancelled from inception.
Please be aware, if the policy is cancelled from inception, you will not be able to make a claim under it as it will be considered null and void.
To help you stay protected, please call us on 01242 808740 to make a payment or discuss further.
Please note, for data security reasons, do not send credit or debit card details to us via email.
If you have made a payment in the past 3 working days please disregard this email.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
